description:
§18.0 — a VALUE-form `match` arm (`match p.role { .Admin :>

admin

... }`) whose body is a markup element instead of a value SHALL fire E-MATCH-ARM-MARKUP-IN-VALUE, steering the author to the structural `` block form for rendering UI per variant. Regression guard: a value-form arm returns a VALUE; emitting markup there is an altitude error the steer must catch (it REPLACES the downstream E-SCOPE-001 / E-CODEGEN-INVALID-LOGIC cascade with one clear diagnostic).
rationale:
§18.0: a value-form `match` arm returns a VALUE, not markup. An arm body that is a markup element (`

...

`) is rejected with E-MATCH-ARM-MARKUP-IN-VALUE; to render a UI tree per variant use the Tier-1 block `` form (§18.0.1).
